meta.name: Waterproof ReSet Call Point
meta.heroTitle: IP67 Resettable Manual Call Point, EN54-11
meta.heroDescription:
IP67-rated resettable manual call point with break-glass simulation element. Visible activation indicator and key-operated reset mechanism for immediate reinstatement.

Available in multiple colour options with three electrical configurations, including EN54-11 certified fire model.

Intended for outdoor fire alarm installations requiring sealed enclosure and compliance with EN54-11.
